features: KIDS PARTY BAGS: Included in this pack are 24 children's dinosaur party bags. Each bag is made from high-quality brown kraft paper with a cute T-Rex print design making them perfect for all kids dino-themed parties. All the bags come flat packed, when opened they measure 13.5cm (5.31 inches) in length, 7.9cm (3.11 inches) in width and 22.8cm (8.98 inches) in height. These small eco-friendly gift favour bags have a sturdy bottom and 2 strong string carrying handles at the top of the bags.

DINOSAUR DESIGN: Our bags are perfect for kids dinosaur themed parties to bring more joy and fun. The design is suitable for both boys and girls. Printed on the side of each brown kraft bag is a shiny green tyrannosaurus rex dinosaur. Below this image is text spelling "ROAR!". Children will love receiving these dinosaur print bags and be delighted to find out what awaits inside. Coordinate these bags with other dinosaur related party supplies such as balloons, cups, plates and napkins to match.

ECO-FRIENDLY PAPER: These paper bags are made from premium eco-friendly and recyclable material. When folded they are quick and easy to open up and form into a sturdy bag which will ensure contents remain securely inside. When the party is over, flatten out the bags and fold them away to be reused again. You can write children's names onto the kraft paper treat bags with a pen or ink marker. You can also further decorate the surface of the paper with stickers for the perfect finishing touch.

MANY OCCASIONS: Use these bags for dinosaur themed kids birthday parties, christening parties, celebrations and baby showers at home or at a hired venue. You can also use these eye-catching bags in a school classroom. Place gifts, goodies and products into the bags to give out to guests at the start or end of a party. Place the party favour bags on tables as part of the room decoration. Hold a wide range of treats such as wrapped candy, snacks, sweets, chocolate and small toys in the bags.

DESIGNED FOR LIFE: Every product in our collection is built with purpose, blending function and style. Our thoughtfully crafted designs ensure lasting reliability and convenience when needed, ideal for any occasion.
